sections.paragraph:
Original: עופי o

Transliteration: ‛ôphay

Phonetic: o-fah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Ephai = "gloomy"
  1. a Netophathite, whose sons were among the captains of the forces left in Judah after the deportation to Babylon

Origin: from H5775

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
